A California summer
to remember.

James, here is your proposed itinerary for a 7-day California adventure departing just after the Fourth of July. We've sequenced everything chronologically — starting with your first night in Folsom, moving through San Francisco, Yosemite, and Napa Valley, before returning home on July 12.

Accommodation · Night 1 of 7
First Night — Folsom, California
Night 1
Sunday, July 5 → Monday, July 6 · 1 Night · 2 Adults

After arriving into Sacramento and picking up your rental car, head to Folsom — a charming Gold Rush city about 20 minutes from the airport. Three hotel options are presented below.

Experience · San Francisco · Day Tour
Golden Gate, Muir Woods, Sausalito & Alcatraz
Day 2
Monday, July 6, 2026 · Departs 9:00 AM · 6 Hours
July 6 · 9:00 AM Start · ~6 Hours
Golden Gate Bridge Muir Woods Sausalito with Optional Alcatraz
The quintessential San Francisco day — walk among ancient redwoods in Muir Woods, cross into charming Sausalito, and cap the day with an official Alcatraz Island tour. A full-day adventure covering the city's most iconic landmarks.
Full Day · 6 hrs

Experience · Yosemite · 2-Day Tour with Lodging
Yosemite National Park — 2 Days from San Francisco
Days 4 & 5
Wednesday July 8 → Thursday July 9 · Lodging Included
July 8 – 10 · 2 Days · Lodging Included
Yosemite National Park 2-Day Tour from San Francisco
Spend two awe-inspiring days in one of America's most beloved national parks. Walk beneath El Capitan, discover Yosemite Falls, and explore the valley floor. Lodging inside or near the park is included. Booked on average 72 days in advance — early reservation recommended.

Experience · Napa Valley · Gourmet Dinner Train
Napa Valley Wine Train — Deluxe Dinner Experience
Day 6
Thursday, July 10, 2026 · 6:20 PM · 2.5 Hours
July 10 · 6:20 PM · 2.5 Hours
Napa Valley Wine Train: Gourmet Express 2.5-Hour Dinner Train
Board a beautifully restored vintage rail car as it winds through the heart of Napa Valley wine country. Enjoy a gourmet dinner with wine pairings while passing through world-famous vineyards. Full refund available if cancelled 30 days in advance.
Dinner Train · 2.5 hrs
